Choose Imprint for Your Product ▼

Choose <i>either</i> <strong>Full-Color</strong> or <strong>Pantone Color Match</strong> (additional charge will incur).

4CP

4 Color Process

Exact color matches, metallic or fluorescent colors <strong>are not available</strong>.

9001

Pantone Color Match

Printed to match Coated Pantone Color Bridge book.

$50.00 each

Copy Change ▼

Up to 10 copy changes available at standard pricing. Please contact us for a quote on 11 or more copy changes. Select the number of additional changes and use the Choices text box to type in instructions. If you have different copy for the same product, you may group the copy changes on the same order. <strong>NOTE:</strong> There is only 1 copy change charge no matter how many colors change if printing is in full color (four color process). <font color="b31b34"><strong>Published minimum quantities for all products apply for copy changes. Copy Changes are limited to changing 6 lines of copy, a photo and a logo. In addition, the items must all have a common background or main layout that does not change.</strong></font> <i>Please Note: Once an order is submitted to factory, copy changes cannot be added.</i> <hr>

Pen Inserted Into Pen Holder ▼

Pen is inserted into pen holder of each board before shipping the board. <U><STRONG>ONLY</u></strong> used with option <STRONG>9wrap heat sealed poly bag</STRONG> (if not, pens fall out of loop during shipment). Normal pen packaging is bulk 100 pens in a bag.

9PENLOOP

Proof Options ▼

9ONLINE

Internet Color Proof

Online Proofing is to show you color and/or color breaks, but IS NOT an exact color matching proofing system. Output from laser printers, ink-jet printers or what you view on your computer monitor cannot be matched. These methods are subjective and may not accurately represent your final printed product.

9DIGITAL

Digital Press Proof

Color press proofs are a close representation of the color of your product. Press proofs are available on four-color process items. Please note that wall calendar/booklet digital press proof sheets are printed on a digital press. The final product may be printed on a conventional press, therefore, a 5% difference in color, contrast and saturation may occur. This proof will not be trimmed, stapled, UV-coated, or feature a heavy cover. <strong>Press proofs are sent via overnight shipping at customer's expense. If you do not want your proofs expedited, please contact Customer Service. Note pads not available for this service.</strong>

$30.00 each

9002

Production Proof

Actual printed & laminated product proofs. Pre-Production Proofs for Wall Calendar/Booklet Pre-Production Proof are printed on a digital press. The final product may be printed on a conventional press, therefore, a 5% difference in color, contrast and saturation may occur.<strong>Product proofs are sent via overnight shipping at customer's expense. If you do not want your proofs expedited, please contact Customer Service. Printed product proofs & shipping are FREE OF CHARGE on orders of $6,250(G) or more. Pantone® color matches are billed at $50(C) per color on all product proofs.</strong>

$80.00 each

Final quote may reflect selected options, proofs, rush, or freight beyond list pricing.
salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Healthcare Memo Board - 8.5x11 Laminated - 14 pt.. Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style 1000L on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For decoration and imprint methods, follow supplier notes in the Description tab.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
inventoryHtml:
Merchandise is typically sourced to order. Stock and availability may vary by supplier and season.

Supplier-stated production window: 7 days (not including transit).

Contact the studio for rush feasibility, split shipments, or multi-location drops before placing large orders.

Minimum order quantity: 100 units (per catalog line).
